title: Explorers Bag Of Holding
description: Improves the Bag of Holding texture by switching them to the Explorers Companion Backpacks
body:
Improves the Bag of Holding texture by switching them to the [Explorers Companion](https://modrinth.com/mod/bag-of-holding) Backpacks

A big thank you to [Lord\_Of\_Crumbs](https://modrinth.com/user/Lord_Of_Crumbs) for allowing the use of these textures!

If you want the GUI Colours to match the new bags use the datapack found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/explorers-bag-of-holding/version/1.0.1)

![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HA6Rx1gG/images/8ce2e51421adca9c97ebced907cb55b2cb4942c7.png)
